<div align="center">

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="280" height="280" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="circle-clip">
      <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="120"/>
    </clipPath>
    <style>
      @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
      @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { opacity:.4; } 50% { opacity:.9; } }
      @keyframes ring-grow { 0%,100% { r: 130; opacity:.3; } 50% { r: 138; opacity:.6; } }
      .orbit { transform-origin: 150px 150px; animation: spin 12s linear infinite; }
      .orbit-slow { transform-origin: 150px 150px; animation: spin 20s linear infinite reverse; }
      .glow-ring { animation: ring-grow 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .dot-pulse { animation: pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .dot-pulse-d1 { animation: pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: .8s; }
      .dot-pulse-d2 { animation: pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 1.6s; }
    </style>
  </defs>
  <circle class="glow-ring" cx="150" cy="150" r="134" fill="none" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".4"/>
  <circle class="glow-ring" cx="150" cy="150" r="140" fill="none" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width=".5" opacity=".2" style="animation-delay:.5s"/>
  <g class="orbit">
    <circle cx="150" cy="16" r="3" fill="#5DCAA5" class="dot-pulse"/>
    <circle cx="284" cy="150" r="2" fill="#5DCAA5" class="dot-pulse-d1"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="284" r="3" fill="#5DCAA5" class="dot-pulse-d2"/>
    <circle cx="16" cy="150" r="2" fill="#5DCAA5" class="dot-pulse"/>
  </g>
  <g class="orbit-slow">
    <circle cx="60" cy="40" r="2" fill="#E24B4A" class="dot-pulse-d1"/>
    <circle cx="240" cy="40" r="1.5" fill="#F0997B" class="dot-pulse"/>
    <circle cx="260" cy="240" r="2" fill="#E24B4A" class="dot-pulse-d2"/>
    <circle cx="40" cy="250" r="1.5" fill="#F0997B" class="dot-pulse-d1"/>
  </g>
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="134" fill="none" stroke="#5DCAA5" stroke-width=".4" stroke-dasharray="4 8" opacity=".3"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="146" fill="none" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width=".3" stroke-dasharray="3 10" opacity=".2"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="122" fill="#0d1117" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="120" fill="none" stroke="#1D9E75" stroke-width=".5" opacity=".5"/>
  <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="30" y="30" width="240" height="240" clip-path="url(#circle-clip)" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"/>
</svg>

# AAA Financial Technology

**We build tools that make financial operations effortless.**

From ERP automation to accounting workflows, we ship solutions<br>
that eliminate manual work and let finance teams focus on what matters.

<br>

[![NetSuite](https://img.shields.io/badge/◆_NetSuite-%230d1117?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=5DCAA5)](.)
[![SuiteScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/◆_SuiteScript-%230d1117?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=5DCAA5)](.)
[![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/◆_Node.js-%230d1117?style=for-the-badge&logo=nodedotjs&logoColor=5DCAA5)](.)
[![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/◆_Python-%230d1117?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=5DCAA5)](.)
[![SuiteQL](https://img.shields.io/badge/◆_SuiteQL-%230d1117?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=5DCAA5)](.)

</div>

<div align="center">

<table>
<tr><td colspan="2" align="center">

### ⚡&ensp;What we ship

</td></tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top" align="center">

**🔩&ensp;ERP Automation**

Journal entries, approval workflows, and posting<br>
period management across NetSuite environments.

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top" align="center">

**📡&ensp;Data Pipelines**

Reliable data movement between accounting<br>
systems — accuracy and auditability at every step.

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top" align="center">

**🔗&ensp;Workflow Orchestration**

Custom automation for distribution requests,<br>
reversals, and multi-step financial processes.

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top" align="center">

**🛡️&ensp;Compliance Controls**

Built-in guardrails for approval hierarchies,<br>
period controls, and audit trails.

</td>
</tr>
</table>

</div>

<div align="center">

|  | Integrations | Uptime | Manual JEs |
|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
| 📊 | **12+** | **99.9%** | **0** |

<br>

<sub>built with ☕ and too many journal entries</sub>

</div>
